response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical versatility across languages including Python, JavaScript, and C/C++, and a proven track record in building scalable systems and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of leading experimentation platforms, telemetry infrastructure, or AI-driven growth systems at enterprise scale — key requirements for this Principal role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with JavaScript/TypeScript, C++, and DLang across distributed systems
Proven ability to build and ship open-source infrastructure (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) with real-world adoption
Strong technical leadership demonstrated through mentoring, workshops, and cross-team tooling contributions
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or owning experimentation frameworks, feature flagging, or growth measurement systems
Limited visibility into large-scale telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis for experimentation
AI tooling experience mentioned vaguely (AI-agent infrastructure) without depth or impact on growth systems
